suites.label: HR
suites.description: The single source of truth for everyone who works here. Hire, manage, and stay compliant as people move through the company.

apps.label: Time Off
apps.source: app/apps/utils/navigation_bar.py:1627 (legacy variant, hidden when TIME_PLATFORM installed via should_hide_legacy_time_apps())

suites.label: Talent
suites.description: Bring in the right people and help them grow. Recruiting, performance, compensation, surveys, and learning, all connected to the same employee record.

suites.label: Payroll
suites.description: Pay everyone on time, in any country, with the right taxes withheld. Run cycles, handle contractors, and reconcile to your books.

suites.label: Finance
suites.description: See and control how the company spends money. Cards, expense reports, bills, procurement, and travel in one place.

suites.label: Time
suites.description: Know who worked when. Schedule shifts, capture timecards, and approve time off without spreadsheets.

suites.label: Benefits
suites.description: Give employees the health, retirement, and pre-tax benefits they expect — and let Rippling handle enrollment, deductions, and compliance.

suites.label: IT
suites.description: Keep employees equipped, secure, and productive. Provision devices, gate apps, run access reviews, and automate IT busywork.

suites.label: Data
suites.description: Turn employee and operational data into reports, dashboards, and pipelines. The substrate behind everything else in Rippling.

suites.label: Banking
suites.description: Move money and manage accounts from inside Rippling. Treasury and cash flow without switching tools.

suites.label: Global
suites.description: Hire and pay international employees and contractors compliantly, without setting up entities yourself.

suites.label: Rippling PEO
suites.description: Outsource the burdensome parts of HR. Rippling co-employs your team, handling tax accounts, posters, and compliance.

suites.label: Custom Apps
suites.description: Extend Rippling to fit your business. Build custom apps, dashboards, automations, and integrations using your own data.

suites.label: Tools
suites.description: Day-to-day utilities that cut across the company. Inbox, approvals, documents, audit log, and meetings.

suites.label: Settings
suites.description: How your Rippling instance is wired up. Permissions, organizational data, API tokens, and AI configuration.
